title: Plugins and Integrations
description: Discover the available plugins and integrations to enhance your experience with Versatile Thermostat. Explore a variety of plugins created by the community to customize and optimize your heating system.
description_short: Extend functionality with integrations, interfaces and blueprints created by the community. If you have developed a plugin, feel free to <0>submit your plugin</0> so it can be shared with the community.
keywords: addons, integrations, plugins, dashboard, Home Assistant, Auto TPI, Versatile Store, TRVZB linearity
